name: Pignoli Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Flour, or a little less
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together until very soft.
2. Carefully blend in the ground almonds, salt, vanilla, and flour. The dough will be rather firm.
3. Cut off pieces about the size of prunes and roll them into little cigar-shaped pieces about 1/2-inch thick.
4. Roll these pieces in chopped pine nuts and bend them into a half-moon shape.
5. Place the cookies 1 inch apart on greased baking pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15-to-20 minutes until set but not browned.
7. Cool about 5 minutes, then strew with a little granulated sugar or brush with heavily sweetened milk.
